$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
$Version = "121.0.6167.85"
$BaseUrl = "https://storage.googleapis.com/chrome-for-testing-public/$Version/win64/chrome-win64.zip"
$BaseDir = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "..\bin"
$ZipPath = Join-Path $BaseDir "chrome.zip"
$DestFile = Join-Path $BaseDir "chrome-win64\chrome.exe"

Write-Host "[Setup] Windows Environment Check..."
if (-not (Test-Path $BaseDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $BaseDir | Out-Null }

if (Test-Path $DestFile) {
    Write-Host "[Success] Chrome already installed." -ForegroundColor Green
    exit 0
}

Write-Host "[Setup] Downloading Chrome v$Version..."
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $BaseUrl -OutFile $ZipPath

Write-Host "[Setup] Extracting..."
Expand-Archive -Path $ZipPath -DestinationPath $BaseDir -Force
Remove-Item -Path $ZipPath

if (Test-Path $DestFile) {
    Write-Host "[Success] Setup complete." -ForegroundColor Green
} else {
    Write-Host "[Error] Extraction failed." -ForegroundColor Red
    exit 1
}
